items.title: Silicon Mingle Manchester: June Mingle
items.source_url:
https://events.compiledmcr.com/

Our June Silicon Mingle is just around the corner!

​We're heading back to Lock 91 on the 24th June and making the most of it's fantastic canal side terrace for an evening of relaxed networking with people from across Manchester's tech scene

​If you're curious about the local tech ecosystem, do come and join us!

​💬 What to Expect

  • ​No panels

  • ​No pitches

  • ​No presentations

​Just good old-fashioned networking, easy conversations, and a chance to meet people you might really click with. Whether you’re bringing a co-founder, a colleague, or just yourself, this event is all about making meaningful connections.

​💌 Grab your ticket and join Manchester’s tech community for an April’s mingle that’s all about ideas, collaboration, and connection.
